item.title: [Segurança] Researchers Discover Critical GitHub CVE-2026-3854 RCE Flaw Exploitable via Single Git Push
item.description:
🚨 Researchers Discover Critical GitHub CVE-2026-3854 RCE Flaw Exploitable via Single Git Push
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.7
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a critical security vulnerability impacting GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise Server that could allow an authenticated user to obtain remote code execution with a single "git push" command. The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-3854 (CVSS score: 8.7), is a case of command injection that could allow an attacker with push access to a repository to achieve
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/researchers-discover-critical-github.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
item.description:
🚨 CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.4
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added two security flaws impacting ConnectWise ScreenConnect and Microsoft Windows to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2024-1708 (CVSS score: 8.4) - A path traversal vulnerability in ConnectWise ScreenConnect
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cisa-adds-actively-exploited.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8223-1: Roundcube Webmail vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8223-1: Roundcube Webmail vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Roundcube Webmail mishandled Punycode xn-- domain names. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a homograph attack. (CVE-2019-15237) It was discovered that Roundcube Webmail did not properly sanitize certain attributes when handling CSS within HTML messages and certain SVG attributes. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a cross-site scripting attack. (CVE-2024-38356,...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8223-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-6741 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6741 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The LatePoint – Calendar Booking Plugin for Appointments and Events plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in versions up to and including 5.4.1. This is due to a missing authorization check in the execute() method of the connect-customer-to-wp-user ability, which only requires the customer__edit capability granted to the latepoint_agent role by default, without verifying whether the target WordPr...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6741

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8217-1: follow-redirects vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8217-1: follow-redirects vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that follow-redirects did not properly protect sensitive user information during redirects. An attacker could possibly use this issue to expose sensitive information. This issue only affected Ubuntu 18.04 LTS and Ubuntu 20.04 LTS. (CVE-2022-0155) It was discovered that follow-redirects did not properly remove sensitive information before storage or transfer. An attacker could possibly use this issue...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8217-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8222-1: OpenSSH vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8222-1: OpenSSH vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Christos Papakonstantinou discovered that the OpenSSH scp tool incorrectly handled the legacy scp protocol (-O) option. This could result in certain files being installed setuid or setgid, contrary to expectations. (CVE-2026-35385) Florian Kohnhäuser discovered that OpenSSH incorrectly handled shell metacharacters in usernames within a command line. When untrusted usernames and non-default configurations using % in s...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8222-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-42525 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-42525 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
Jenkins Microsoft Entra ID (previously Azure AD) Plugin 666.v6060de32f87d and earlier does not restrict the redirect URL after login, allowing attackers to perform phishing attacks.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42525

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-41365 - Office
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41365 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
OpenClaw before 2026.3.31 contains a sender allowlist bypass vulnerability in MS Teams thread history fetched via Graph API. Attackers can retrieve thread messages that should be filtered by sender allowlists, bypassing message filtering restrictions.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41365

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2025-60887 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-60887 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
An issue was discovered in Cista v0.15 and below. Insecure deserialization of untrusted input under certain conditions may lead to leaking of stack/heap addresses which may be used to bypass ASLR. Classes with pointer-like mechanics under the cista::raw namespace are prone to reference tampering, where Cista does not perform sufficient checks to safeguard against self-referencing pointers and referencing other data w...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-60887

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Oracle Quarterly Critical Patches Issued April 21, 2026
item.description:
💣 Oracle Quarterly Critical Patches Issued April 21, 2026
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Oracle products, the most severe of which could allow for remote code execution. Successful exploitation of the most severe of these vulnerabilities could result in an attacker gaining the same privileges as the logged-on user. Depending on the privileges associated with the user, an attacker could then install programs; view, change, or delete data; or create new acco...
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/oracle-quarterly-critical-patches-issued-april-21-2026_2026-041

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to secure their Windows systems against a vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-windows-flaw-exploited-in-zero-day-attacks/

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] A Vulnerability in OpenSSH Could Allow for Authentication Bypass
item.description:
📢 A Vulnerability in OpenSSH Could Allow for Authentication Bypass
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a CIS Advisories, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/a-vulnerability-in-openssh-could-allow-for-authentication-bypass_2026-040

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Mozilla Products Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description:

Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a CIS Advisories, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.

item.title: [Segurança] Learning from the Vercel breach: Shadow AI & OAuth sprawl
item.description:
📰 Learning from the Vercel breach: Shadow AI & OAuth sprawl
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A single third-party OAuth integration can become a direct path into your environment. Push explains how the Vercel breach shows a compromised OAuth app can lead to widespread impact across downstream customers.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/learning-from-the-vercel-breach-shadow-ai-and-oauth-sprawl/

item.title: [Segurança] Cursor AI Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution - Let's Data Science
item.description:
📰 Cursor AI Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution - Let's Data Science
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a SentinelOne, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxNRVZ6YUlhbG1MeFJKbHk3b0lJVm1lb2xaMGxEUGNxWk5Bbzg0YVoxdkoyQ0ZMbGZnTGZ5ckpFUVBsaUNfU3FVOWJkU2phRDdVbUNfT09SSTA1V3c5NjdNSzlKOGNhcF8zV3doaGhXVUNlYy16WTRwZ2pLMGp4NzZMWGpnYnF0cDdnZGhMYTN2Z29ENzlDZ0liMVpkQQ?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Enhance Lateral Security and Ingress Load Balancing for Kubernetes Workloads
item.description:
📰 Enhance Lateral Security and Ingress Load Balancing for Kubernetes Workloads
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Through our work with enterprise customers deploying production Kubernetes workloads on VMware Cloud Foundation, we’ve learned a critical lesson: the networking and security choices you make can either enable or undermine your Kubernetes success. Traditional approaches create the exact friction Kubernetes was meant to eliminate: bolting legacy load balancers onto containers, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/29/avi-and-vdefend-for-vsphere-kubernetes-service/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Avi Load Balancer Analytics: Root Cause Application Performance Issues in Minutes
item.description:
📰 Avi Load Balancer Analytics: Root Cause Application Performance Issues in Minutes
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Application slowness and downtime severely affect customer satisfaction, cause business interruptions, and can potentially impact revenue. When a critical app fails in complex, distributed environments, quickly identifying the root cause is the biggest challenge. During high-severity incidents, IT teams struggle in troubleshooting war rooms. Teams are constantly frustrated, with a fundamental question: does the issue...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/load-balancing/2026/04/28/root-cause-app-performance-issues-in-minutes-with-avi/

Ferramenta: ESX

CVSS: 2.0
